li.style: color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183)); scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251);

ul.li: Test Workflow: Test workflow calls all backend services test endpoints.

li.style: color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183)); scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251);

ul.li:
Test Workflow 2:
Test workflow calls all backend services test endpoints in different order.

li.style: color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183)); scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251);
li.span: Create Product Workflow: Workflow to create a product and inventory.

li.style: color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183)); scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251);

ul.li: Delete Product Workflow: Workflow to delete a product and its inventory.

li.style: scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251); color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183));

ul.li: Create Order Workflow: Workflow to create a order. It creates a user if it doens't exist, reserves inventory, creates an order, and emails the user when it completes.

li.style: color: light-dark(rgb(63, 63, 63), rgb(183, 183, 183)); scrollbar-color: rgb(226, 226, 226) rgb(251, 251, 251);

ul.li: Update Order Status Workflow to update the order status. Completed orders reduce both reserved and available inventory quantities, while cancelled orders release reserved inventory.
